name: MYRIAD GENETICS INC
summary: PART I Overview and Mission Myriad Genetics is a leading molecular diagnostics and precision medicine company committed to advancing health and well-being for all. We develop and commercialize molecular tests that help patients and providers uncover genetic insights. Our tests assess the risk of developing disease or disease progression and guide treatment decisions across medical specialties where molecular insights can significantly improve patient care, support earlier detection, enable more ...
